refnamediv.refpurpose: Creates a LineString from an Encoded Polyline.

refsection.title: Description
refsection.para: Creates a LineString from an Encoded Polyline string.
Optional precision specifies how many decimal places will be preserved in Encoded Polyline. Value should be the same on encoding and decoding, or coordinates will be incorrect.

refsection.title: Examples
refsection.programlisting:
-- Create a line string from a polyline SELECT ST_AsEWKT(ST_LineFromEncodedPolyline('_p~iF~ps|U_ulLnnqC_mqNvxq`@')); -- result -- SRID=4326;LINESTRING(-120.2 38.5,-120.95 40.7,-126.453 43.252)
-- Select different precision that was used for polyline encoding SELECT ST_AsEWKT(ST_LineFromEncodedPolyline('_p~iF~ps|U_ulLnnqC_mqNvxq`@',6)); -- result -- SRID=4326;LINESTRING(-12.02 3.85,-12.095 4.07,-12.6453 4.3252)
